change_log_latest:
• ⚡ Replaced the raw streaming markdown tail with a live preview lane that auto-closes unfinished inline markers and open blocks before rendering, so headings, bold text, and inline code stay readable while tokens are still arriving.
• 🐞 Stopped unfinished strong markers from bleeding across later lines in the live preview, which fixes the broken multi-line bold/title behavior shown in the chat transcript screenshots.
• 🧪 Added browser-smoke coverage for unfinished bold/code preview rendering and reran the guarded build plus regenerated test-HTML DOM validation for the streaming markdown path.
change_log_release:
v0.8.28

• ⚡ Added a resilient transcript follow fallback so the bottom sentinel uses `scrollIntoView` in real browsers and automatically falls back to direct bottom pinning where that DOM API is unavailable, keeping both the shipped panel and the test harness stable.
• 🐞 Fixed the browser-smoke follow verification path so the regenerated `web-ui.test.html` no longer throws on environments like jsdom while still validating that live streaming stays attached near the bottom.
• 🧪 Rebuilt the installer/test artifacts again and rechecked the chat follow behavior directly in Playwright against the regenerated test HTML DOM.

v0.8.27

• ⚡ Reworked transcript follow mode again around a persistent bottom sentinel plus a single RAF-scheduled `scrollIntoView`, so live token streaming now keeps following correctly instead of only snapping to the end when the checkbox is toggled.
• 🐞 Preserved the transcript anchor across full rerenders and placeholder states, which fixes the broken follow behavior caused by rebuilding the transcript DOM while generation was still in progress.
• 🧪 Upgraded the browser smoke to measure real bottom-follow deltas during a mocked live stream, then revalidated the regenerated `web-ui.test.html` DOM with Playwright before shipping the new build.

v0.8.26

• ⚡ Reworked chat streaming follow mode to use a CSS bottom-anchor instead of repeated transcript `scrollTop` writes, which keeps token generation smooth while auto-scroll is enabled and still lets the checkbox disable follow mode instantly.
• 🐞 Replaced the composer’s JS height-sync loop with CSS-native textarea growth, removing the resize reflow churn that was making the transcript and input area stutter together during active chatting.
• 🧪 Added smoke coverage for the new transcript anchor/class toggle path, then rebuilt and reran the guarded build + smoke flow for the release.
